name: Topower Co., Ltd.
summary: Topower Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells auto parts, power supply and LED products, and auto lamps in Taiwan. It offers auto parts, such as car and truck parts, and auto accessories; ATX and IPC power supply products; and LED products, including bulbs, candle lights, downlights, T bars, mini bulbs, spotlights, and tubes, as well as auto and truck lamps, and LED universal lights. The company was formerly known as Topower Computer Industrial Co., Ltd. Topower Co., Ltd. was founded in 1986 and is headquartered in Tainan City, Taiwan.
